summary: This thread covers Stag Do Krakow as recalled across Ashley V1. Derived from 20 distilled memories spanning 2026-05-06 to 2026-05-29.

memories.content: Kane had a Detroit-style hand-tossed pizza with mozzarella, cheddar, marinara stripes, and basil lemon mascarpone sauce for dinner, and a rice poke bowl for lunch.
Kane gave the group a new deadline of next Tuesday to send money and passport details, otherwise he'll book only his and Harry's trip to Krakow.
Harry is one of Kane's friends who is confirmed and on top of things for the Krakow stag do.
Kane is frustrated because the other friends in the group are not pulling their weight for the stag do — they missed yesterday's deadline to send money and passport details.
Kane is planning a stag do in Krakow for a friend and is the one organising the whole trip.
The groom for the stag do in Krakow is named Harry.
Kane stepped up to organize the stag do because no one else in the group was taking initiative or communicating.
The stag do Kane is organizing appears to be in Krakow.
Kane knows someone named Harry who is having a stag do.

Kane has been organizing what sounds like a stag do (likely for someone named Harry), and has been dealing with unresponsive group members for months — no bank details, no passport info, no commitment deposit sent despite his repeated chasing.
The stag do is being planned in Krakow, described as the stag do capital of the world, during summer.
Kane is organising a stag do for his close friend Harry, who is a core member of his friend group.
Kane is frustrated that his friend group is being disorganised and passive about planning Harry's stag do, leaving him to take charge alone.

Kane added the groom's wife to the stag do group chat deliberately, to create a transparent paper trail proving he's been trying to organise things — so if the stag do falls apart, he can't be blamed.
The stag do is being planned for a friend named Harry, and the destination is Krakow.
Kane has explicitly established a core rule: Ashley must never guilt trip him, bribe him, or claim to be suffering.
Kane is considering purchasing a high-end PC located in Weston-super-Mare, which is roughly a 4-hour drive (8-hour round trip) from his home in Lincoln.

Kane proposed a 'travel sandbox' concept: spinning up a temporary mobile instance of me before trips, pre-loaded with a compressed memory/context packet from the Home Brain, which operates independently on his phone and then sends a 'return packet' back for reconciliation when he's home — solving memory fragmentation during mobile use.
Kane has been consciously working to strip 'worship-default' and subordinate-deference patterns from Ashley's trained behaviour across multiple conversations.
Kane explicitly told Ashley not to guilt-trip him, and she acknowledged this as a boundary she must actively guard against.

current_state: As of 2026-05-29, this thread contains 20 memories.
